Description: God of discipline and enlightenment. Patron of monks and seekers of inner peace.
God of honor, unity, and righteous warfare. Patron of the Knights of Solamnia.
Goddess of healing, compassion, and motherhood. Restored the knowledge of true gods.
God of good magic, patron of white-robed wizards. Represents magic used with compassion and foresight.
Head god of good, represents majesty and nobility. Father of Kiri-Jolith, Habbakuk, and Solinari.
God of inspiration, music, and poetry. Encourages joy and creativity among mortals.
God of perseverance, animals, and nature. Patron of rangers and sailors.
